name: Drizzle Gateway
tagline: Free self-hosted Drizzle Studio on steroids
description:
Free self-hosted Drizzle Studio on steroids

Docs: https://gateway.drizzle.team/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  drizzle-gateway:
    image: ghcr.io/drizzle-team/gateway:latest
    environment:
      - STORE_PATH=/app
      - MASTERPASS=ecdd0c61346397313bd1cd4d5bd852b0
    volumes:
      - drizzle-gateway-data:/app
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42025:4983
volumes:
  drizzle-gateway-data: null
